examples: The matter has certainly been handled expeditiously by the authorities.
The most probable causes of interruption in the past have been accidental damage or breakdown, and these can usually be dealt with expeditiously.
This measure will come into effect expeditiously once the domestic review process is completed.
The review process is thorough and objective and conducted as expeditiously as possible under the circumstances.
Also the Coast Guard worked to expeditiously, with local officials, open up the Port of New York.
